assignment.title: Trace Evidence Case Studies Assignment
assignment.instructor_text:
Hair and fiber evidence has been used in  many cases in the past to connect suspects with a crime.  Occasionally, these cases are overturned with DNA evidence in the future.  Despite this, trace evidence such as hair and fiber has many valuable uses in solving crimes.  The following assignment will have you examine some of these cases.

Complete the following assignment about using trace evidence to solve crimes. Click on the image below to make a copy of the Trace Evidence Case Studies Assignment.  Remember to double click on the header to open it and add your name to the document.

When you have completed the assignment, upload it below and select Submit to complete your submission.

Revisit the Course Information section if you need a refresher on how to submit your assignments.
